title: Delicate Springy Egyptian Shrimp Kebabs
description: A kid-friendly Egyptian dish featuring jumbo shrimp, this recipe is a delicious and fatty meal option that is Jain-friendly, made by mantecare-emulsifying the ingredients to create a springy texture.
instructions: Preheat the grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, ginger, cumin, coriander, salt, and black pepper.
Add the jumbo shrimp to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated shrimp onto skewers, leaving a small space between each shrimp.
Grill the shrimp kebabs for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until they are pink and cooked through.
Serve the shrimp kebabs hot, garnished with lemon wedges and fresh parsley.
Mantecare-emulsify the ingredients by whisking constantly while adding the olive oil to the lemon juice mixture.
Let the shrimp kebabs rest for 2 minutes before serving.
